topic: Running a local AI assistant on Linux: what I learned after 30 days
prompt: Write about the practical experience of running a local LLM (qwen2.5:32b via ollama) on a Linux workstation. Cover: hardware requirements, what works well, latency trade-offs, and why local AI matters for privacy and cost. Target: developers curious about local AI.

title: AI automation topic from world context
outline: Write about recent trends in local AI and automation
